title: storage — product analytics
description: Product-analytics events (distinct from operational metrics). Fired to the analytics sink when a user takes a meaningful action worth understanding at the product level. Every event carries tenant_id + user_id; PII stripped per data-classes.json.

events.name: file_uploaded
events.description: A file successfully finished uploading and became available. Distinct from the FileUploaded domain event — this is the product-analytics projection.

events.name: file_shared
events.description: A tenant user explicitly shared a file (issued a share-reason signed URL).

events.name: quota_upgrade_prompted
events.description: The overquota rejection screen surfaced an upgrade CTA to the tenant admin.

events.name: variant_missing_fallback
events.description: The wire projection had to fall back to the original for a missing variant. Signals variant generation lag or a failed variant.

notes: product_analytics consent tier is opt-in per user (see notifications::NotificationCategory.consent_tier). Users who declined product analytics are excluded from every event above.
Physical file bytes are NEVER included in analytics payloads. Only metadata.
Tenant-level opt-out (admin setting) applies platform-wide for the tenant — no event for any user in that tenant.
